title: Momo's Heroes
body:
![partner code](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/29142d53-bc83-4c30-b2f7-f531c7b93118.webp)


A Superhero mod that adds superheroes/powers using palladium and a vew other mods the mod adds
<details>
<summary>Superheroes</summary>
  
  <details>
  <summary>Iron Man</summary>

<details>
<summary>Mark85</summary>



    
![the crafting recipe for nanobot housing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Momo72500/Momo-s-Heroes/main/Screenshot%202024-07-26%20at%2015.24.55.png)




    
If you have the Mark85 suit you have these powers:
1.     Flight
2.     Unibeam
3.     Repulsor
4.     Nanobot Healing(A suggested ability that heals you when you are under 5 hearts)
5.     NanoTech Creation
    

</details>


  </details>

</details>

There are also a lot of other recipes
